shape_semantics: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,L,W: value_profile AND naive resolve, value_profile_cmplog BLOCKS, cmplog non-decisive. ANTI-SYNERGY -- adding the I2S stage to value_profile (vpc = both techniques) HURTS: vpc loses to vp-alone and to naive. The verification question for every branch is WHY the extra I2S delta blocks what vp-alone resolves.

hypotheses.label: vpc's I2S substitution pins the corpus to a WRONG decoy literal (sibling case / enumerated case / valid-range boundary), flooding the loser corpus with a value that blocks the target arm

params.decoy_source: the sibling / enumerated-case / boundary literal named in why_loser_doesnt (e.g. MONGOLIAN/NKO tag for 5761, 0x11481 sibling for 6124_h0, the 0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006 case literals for 6263, the GSUB/GPOS table tags for 6162/6210, 0x20 space-class for 5683)
params.target_value: the W-resolving operand named in why_winner_satisfies

hypotheses.prediction: vpc's corpus is ENRICHED for the decoy literal relative to vp (decoy_enrich > 0) while NOT enriched for the target value (signed_target_enrich <= 0). G1-discriminating: pure overhead/throughput drain (the rival hypothesis) predicts NO directional byte-frequency difference between vpc and vp corpora at the gate offset (decoy_enrich ~ 0) -- it slows the loser without steering it to any specific value. G2-independent: it scores corpus BYTE frequencies at the gate offset, not the vpc resolve/block outcome that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP Hamming gradient lands ON the exact 4-byte switch-case codepoint while vpc's added I2S stage diverts mutation onto sibling operands and never closes the last bits to the exact literal -- a closeness gap, not a wrong-value-floods-corpus gap

params.operand_literal: 0x0E36 for 5623 (width 4, LE bytes 36 0e 00 00); 0x1148D for 6124_h0 (width 4, LE bytes 8d 14 01 00 -- the primary winner-seed literal of the 0x1148B/0x1148D case pair)

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile's resolving corpus lands at or essentially at the exact operand (vp_min_distance ~ 0) while value_profile_cmplog's blocking corpus stalls measurably short of it (vpc_min_distance > vp_min_distance, so distance_gap > 0 with vp the closer arm). G1-discriminating: this separates the GRADIENT-CLOSENESS mechanism from the decoy-overcommit mechanism the prior test already tried and FAILED on these two branches -- decoy_overcommit predicts the vpc corpus is byte-enriched at the gate offset for a NAMED wrong literal (decoy_enrich high); the closeness mechanism instead predicts vpc simply ratchets LESS CLOSE to the target literal (no specific decoy needs to dominate, only that vpc's nearest-window Hamming distance to the exact operand stays larger than vp's). It also rules out pure overhead-drain, which predicts NO closeness gap (vpc would reach the literal just as near, only slower). G2-independent: it measures the minimum Hamming distance from corpus windows to the gate operand, computed from saved seed bytes -- never the vpc resolve/block label that defined the shape.
hypotheses.rule: winner_closer == true AND distance_gap > 0.15 AND vp_min_distance < 0.1

hypotheses.label: vpc's I2S substitution pulls the loser corpus toward shallow / degenerate inputs that never DRIVE THE CALL CHAIN to the deep shaping context where the gate is dispatched; vp's gradient-grown corpus reaches that context far more per seed, so the gate is reachable to vp and structurally out-of-reach to vpc -- a context-REACH shortfall, not a value-match or closeness shortfall

params.branch_line: the gate line per branch: hb-ot-shape-fallback.cc:51 (switch dispatch) for 5623; hb-ot-shaper-indic.cc:937 (do-while loop-exit) for 5865; hb-ot-shaper-vowel-constraints.cc:409 (switch dispatch) for 6124_h0
params.note: depth_lift / winner_depth / loser_depth measure per-seed-normalized executions of the gate LINE (reaching the dispatch / loop context AT ALL, independent of which case or which side is taken). side_lift is deliberately NOT used here -- the blocked-side count IS the resolve/block outcome (G2-coupled).

hypotheses.prediction: vp's resolving seeds execute the gate-line context substantially more per seed than vpc's blocking seeds (winner_deeper == true AND depth_lift >= 1.5), i.e. vpc-blocking seeds rarely even reach the switch dispatch / loop context. G1-discriminating: the two PRIOR mechanisms already tried-and-failed on 5623/6124_h0 BOTH assume vpc REACHES the gate context and only mis-values it -- decoy_overcommit predicts vpc reaches the switch and lands on a SIBLING case (equal context reach, wrong case -> winner_deeper FALSE), and gradient-closeness predicts vpc reaches the switch and gets NEAR but not exact (also equal context reach -> winner_deeper FALSE). Pure overhead-drain likewise predicts vpc reaches the gate just as deeply, only slower in wall-clock (winner_deeper FALSE). Only the context-REACH mechanism predicts vpc's corpus is structurally shallower at the gate line (winner_deeper TRUE). For 5865 (formerly decidable:false: dispersed Indic-syllable assembly with no single operand) this is the FIRST decidable test -- it asks whether vp's assembled multi-glyph syllable drives the do-while loop-exit line per seed while vpc's disrupted shorter records do not, exactly depth_reach's ITERATION-DEPTH subtype. G2-independent: it scores per-seed executions of the gate LINE from a clean cov run, never the True/False side or the vpc resolve/block label that defined the shape.

non_discriminable.label: non-literal / derived-relation gate: I2S has no input-byte literal to substitute, so vpc pays pure CmpLog per-exec overhead and loses on throughput -- no value-level signature to measure, and the gate line collapses onto the resolve/block side so depth_reach cannot separate it either
non_discriminable.why_non_discriminable: bloaty_301 (start>=end pointer-arithmetic relation, none_structural) and libpng_4072_h1 (derived idat_size length field) have NO fixed-offset input literal for I2S to substitute toward, so operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature and value_distance_reached has no operand by construction. The new depth_reach pivot ALSO fails to discriminate them: in both cases the gate line IS an inequality/relation that BOTH arms reach and evaluate every iteration (bloaty: W T=6 F=0, L T=0 F=12 -- both hit line 659; libpng: line 4245 is re-evaluated each IDAT-loop iteration), so the only difference is which SIDE is taken -- and the blocked-side count is exactly the resolve/block outcome that defined the shape (G2 violation). depth_lift on the gate line would be ~1 (equal context reach), so winner_deeper carries no mechanism information here. The only remaining candidate is global corpus-scale scheduling (corpus_size_ratio vpc vs vp), a per-trial quantity confounded by every other branch and by raw exec count -- it cannot attribute a per-branch block to the I2S delta, and an inflated corpus is equally consistent with benign exploration. data_realities: I2S is untagged in mutation_op and value_profile is a feedback, so NO seed_lineage 'I2S-overhead event' is measurable. G3 honest fallback: inconclusive.

corpus_coverage_gap.label: I2S substitution steers the vpc loser corpus toward valid ICC headers whose version major byte stays <= 0x09, depleting the >0x09 target arm -- a clean fixed-offset (offset 0x08) inequality decoy gate that operand_enrichment WOULD score, but the branch is seed-starved on this server and its corpus lives on sB
corpus_coverage_gap.note: lcms_2137 is a single-byte (width 1) inequality gate at file offset 0x08 with operand 0x09; mechanism = I2S pins corpus to valid small version bytes (<=0x09 decoy) starving the >0x09 winner arm -- exactly the decoy_overcommit_wrong_literal signature with an anti/depletion polarity (decoy_enrich for the valid-small-version byte). It is NOT marked decidable:false: per the cross-server rule, lcms is an sB target and this branch is flagged seed_starved (W=2,L=24; rank-10 re-bisect candidate). The owning server arbitrates after re-bisecting >=3 W seeds. operand_enrichment is the correct descriptor; width-1 chance-alignment caveat applies but the >0x09-vs-<=0x09 split is a magnitude (inequality) distinction, not a single-byte equality coincidence.

data_realities_respected: on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -> the decoy, closeness, and context-reach tests score ONLY the harfbuzz branches; bloaty_301, lcms_2137, libpng_4072_h1 have no corpus on s4 and route to their owning server (sB) or fallback.

operand_enrichment needs a fixed-offset VALUE gate (skips structural/length) and >=3 W and >=3 L seeds; value_distance_reached needs one operand_literal and on-disk seeds, and flags width<=2 chance-alignment (both closeness operands are width 4, safe).

depth_reach needs the target's cov image and >=3 W / >=3 L seeds; harfbuzz has its libafl-harfbuzz-cov image and the reps carry resolving_seeds + blocking_seeds, so the context-reach test runs for 5623/5865/6124_h0 on s4. It is applied ONLY to switch-dispatch / loop-exit gate lines where reaching the line is separable from the resolved side -- NOT to bloaty/libpng inequality/derived gates (gate line == resolve side -> G2-coupled).
I2S and value_profile are both invisible in mutation_op (no lineage event) -- no overhead-drain hypothesis is given a lineage descriptor; the non-literal gates fall to decidable:false honestly.

lcms_2137 is NOT marked decidable:false despite seed-starvation/corpus absence on s4 -- it is an sB target with a genuinely discriminable fixed-offset decoy gate; the owning server arbitrates after re-bisecting (cross-server rule).
notes: ROUND-2 RE-DESIGN (loop-until-dry). KEPT verbatim (frozen, superset): (1) decoy_overcommit_wrong_literal (operand_enrichment) and (2) vp_gradient_reaches_exact_literal_i2s_stalls_short (value_distance_reached) -- both carried forward UNCHANGED so the confirmed branch(es) re-validate; no relaxed-threshold re-test of either. NEW mechanism this round for the UNLABELED harfbuzz branches whose two PRIOR value-level tests were SCORED and did NOT hold (5623, 6124_h0) plus the formerly decidable:false assembly branch (5865): vpc_corpus_shallower_context_reach, measured by the previously-UNTRIED depth_reach tool. WHY GENUINELY DIFFERENT (G1): the two priors (operand_enrichment decoy-flood; value_distance_reached closeness) BOTH assume vpc REACHES the gate context and only mis-values it -- decoy predicts equal context reach + wrong sibling case, closeness predicts equal context reach + near-but-not-exact, and both were rule_not_met on 5623/6124_h0. The new hypothesis asserts the OPPOSITE: vpc's I2S-pulled corpus is structurally SHALLOWER at the gate line (rarely drives the deep font-shaping call chain to the switch dispatch / Indic do-while loop at all). depth_reach's per-seed-normalized gate-LINE execution count (depth_lift, winner_deeper) measures exactly that and is FALSIFIABLE: if vpc reaches the gate line as deeply as vp (depth_lift~1, winner_deeper false -- consistent with decoy/closeness/overhead-drain), the hypothesis fails and the branch falls through to fallback. side_lift is deliberately EXCLUDED (blocked-side count == resolve outcome, G2). For 5865 this is the FIRST decidable test -- depth_reach's iteration-depth subtype (does vp's assembled syllable drive the loop-exit line per seed?) replaces the prior honest decidable:false. STILL decidable:false (G3 honest inconclusive): bloaty_301 (start>=end pointer relation -- both arms reach line 659, only the side differs, so depth_lift~1 and side==outcome G2-coupled) and libpng_4072_h1 (derived idat_size length gate re-evaluated each loop iteration -- same gate-line==resolve-side collapse); neither has a fixed-offset literal nor a context-reach signal separable from the resolve outcome, leaving only a confounded global corpus-scale measure. CORPUS-COVERAGE-GAP (NOT decidable:false): lcms_2137 -- a clean single-byte >0x09 decoy gate operand_enrichment would score, but seed-starved and sB-owned; deferred to the owning server per the cross-server rule. G2 throughout: every test scores corpus byte frequencies / corpus-window Hamming distances / per-seed gate-line reach, independent of the vpc resolve pattern that defined the shape.
